# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata: 
 name: {{ .Values.serviceAccountName }}   # default is "default" if not specified in values file or helm chart value overrides, e.g., service_accounts/my-chart/{{- .values.name -}} / my-helm-release (if you are using a subdirectory)
imagePullSecrets: 
 {{ range $key, $value := .Values.imagePullSecrets }}   # default is empty if not specified in values file or helm chart value overrides e.g., image_pull_secrets/my-chart/{{- $name -}} / my-helm-release (if you are using a subdirectory)
  {{$key }}: {}    {# this line will be replaced by the actual secret name #}  
{{ end }}
